features.featureTitle: Replace the quesadilla menu card image (located at the card identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[3]/article[4]/div[1]/div[1]) with a newly generated image showing: a lightly cooked (not fully browned), cheese-only quesadilla with no steam rising from it, plated alongside small side portions of fresh cilantro, sliced white onions, salsa, and sour cream displayed beside the quesadilla to indicate they are available as accompaniments.

Add a short, creative, catchy Mexican food phrase or slogan inside the site header (Header.tsx) to make it feel less bland — for example a witty or bold statement celebrating Mexican cuisine. The phrase should be styled to complement the existing header design without disrupting navigation or layout.
